title: Precision
documentation:
## Purpose
Specifies the numeric precision used when loading or running a model. Controls the trade-off between computation speed, memory usage, and output quality.

## When to use
Set this parameter when deploying models to hardware with specific memory constraints or when optimizing for inference throughput. `float32` offers maximum accuracy; `int4` offers maximum compression with some quality loss.

## Notes
Allowed values: `float32`, `float16`, `int8`, `int4`. Not all models support all precision levels; check the target model's quantization support. Lower precision reduces VRAM usage and increases throughput but may introduce rounding artifacts in sensitive tasks.
